channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court says Trump global tariffs are illegal
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down a suite of President Trump's tariffs on Friday, a historic blow to the administration's economic agenda. The big picture...

item.title: How Jesse Jackson used the South to reshape Democratic politics
item.description: Rev. Jesse Jackson 's influence in the South wasn't just symbolic â it reshaped how political power is allocated in the Democratic Party, says Emory p...

item.title: Kristi Noem tightens her grip on the Department of Homeland Security
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has upended DHS staffing in her first year, pairing high-level leadership ousters with a growing staff exodus....

item.title: AI's populist moment
item.description: AI has hit the campaign trail, with candidates in both parties casting it as a fight over jobs and corporate power. Why it matters: AI is emerging as ...

item.title: Why filling up the gas tank will soon get more expensive
item.description: Data: EIA ; Chart: Axios Visuals The cost to fill up your car will probably climb soon â and the oil price spike over Iran tensions is only one reason...

item.title: Live updates: In rare rebuke of Trump, Supreme Court strikes down tariffs
item.description: The ruling deals a major blow to his signature economic policy and represents a stinging political setback.

item.title: Trump could try to reinstate some tariffs, but with more restraints
Chief Justice John G. Roberts delivered the opinion for the majority
In dissent, Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh wrote he âfirmlyâ disagreed with the decision.
Court doesnât answer whether billions in tariffs must be refunded
âIâve won affordabilityâ: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greeneâs old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called âamazing and impressiveâ despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with âThe Emperor of All Maladiesâ author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
